calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
Off Calendar Dec-13-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant and Moving Party Leonard Williams, (415) 756-9004, appeared in Propria Person
Patricia Caldwell, Esq., The Law offices of Todd Rothbard, (408) 244-4200, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Winterland Partners
RULING:
Evidentiary Hearing was held. Leonard Williams was sworn in for Direct Examination. The following exhibits were Marked for Identification:
Defendant's A: 4 pages consisting SBC statement dated 11/17/04; INTEGRETEL Statement dated 11/17/04; and COPY FROM PAYROLL DIRECT of voided check #1023, all for Leonard Williams at 2000 Post Street, #119.
Defendant's B: Leonard Williams' Claim of Right of Possession.
DEFENDANT LEONARD WILLIAMS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION: GRANTED. Court recessed. During recess, parties reached an agreement. After recess, Court read stipulation into the record. Stipulation and order signed. Exhibits were returned to Defendant. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2004 Continued To Nov-22-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-22-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly from Dept. 206 for a prove-up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks S. Ravinantapricha/R. Edwards, and CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Appearances: Alan Horwitz, Esq. For Plaintiff.
Defendant not present.
Plaintiff witness: Mark Lerma, was sworn and examined.

The following documentary evidence were introduced on behalf of the plaintiff:
EXH. 1 - Lease -----------------------ID/EVID
EXH. 2 - 3 Day Notice to Pay/Quit ----ID/EV

The Court hears testimony and grants judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows: Restitution and possession of premises at 2000 Post Street # 119.
Rent $2,351.94; Costs $230.30; Attorney fees $ 500.00, for the total of $3,055.24
Counsel stipulated for return of the exhibit.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-22-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2004 Off Calendar

NON APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LINDA BURKE
